## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run test:run` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` passes

If UI changes are included, add before/after screenshots or a short recording.
